A Sneak Peek — Before Anyone Else

You’re Invited To Experience
Vivir Heritage First.

We’re launching something amazing — a designer-curated collection of American-made engineered hardwood — and you have special access before it opens to the public. Your complimentary samples are ready — just tell us where to send them.

Claim Your Samples
The Heritage Collection

American-Made. Designer-Curated.
Built To Last Generations.

Premium engineered hardwood from managed U.S. forests, milled in Wisconsin, designed in Arizona. Sixteen styles across two collections — The Designer Collection, inspired by the Arizona landscape, and The Artist Collection, named for the musicians who shaped American culture.

100% American-Made

Sourced, milled, and finished in the USA within 500 miles. From forest to floor.

WearMax Technology

The most water-repellent, scratch-resistant finish in the industry.

Zero-VOC Finishes

Water-based, UV-cured coatings. CARB compliant, LEED credit eligible.

Core 360° HDF

2x more resistant to dent, wear, and moisture than conventional hardwood.

Where Should We Send Them?

Tell us a little about you and your studio. Samples typically ship within 5–7 business days.

Complimentary for design professionals. No purchase necessary.

Your Samples Are On The Way

Thank you — we’ve received your request and the team is preparing your samples now. Expect them at your door within 5–7 business days.
